stemHtml: Which of the following is correct as regards the use of the words "Over" and/or "Out"?

options.a: “Out” at the end of a transmission indicates that you are leaving a VHF frequency.
options.b: “Over” and “out” are not used in VHF communications.
options.c: “Over” and “out” are not used in HF communications.
options.d: “Over” has to be used at the end of every VHF transmission to indicate that the transmission is over and that an answer is expected.
